description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof, surrounded by a green lawn and enclosed by a dark fence. The exterior walls are predominantly white, featuring several rectangular windows of varying sizes arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The front facade includes a simple black door and a set of three windows above, while the rear side has a small covered entryway and additional windows. The property is accessed through a black metal gate, and the yard is spacious, providing ample open space around the building. The house's design is minimalistic, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or overhangs. The overall structure suggests reinforced concrete or masonry construction with glass windows and metal accents.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, surrounded by a green lawn and a dark fence, featuring rectangular windows and a simple entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main black door, three upper windows, and the fenced yard with a visible gate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, a rear entryway, and more windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a small covered entry, additional windows, and the continuation of the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with fewer windows and a clear view of the lawn and fence perimeter.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple black door with no porch or overhang, flush with the facade
